channel.title: Stephen Mandel — 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move by Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing. Not investment advice.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: ADDED META (+3%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) added META in Q4 2025 · 6.4% of portfolio. Small add — already a top Lone Pine position.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: NEW POSITION FTNT · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) new position FTNT in Q4 2025 · 2.8% of portfolio. New Fortinet cybersecurity position.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: ADDED BN (+50%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) added BN (BROADCOM INC) in Q4 2025 · 9.8% of portfolio.

item.title: Stephen Mandel: TRIMMED AMZN (-14%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) trimmed AMZN (AMAZON COM INC) in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio.

item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) trimmed COF (CAPITAL ONE FINL CORP) in Q4 2025 · 4.1% of portfolio.

item.description: Stephen Mandel (Lone Pine Capital) trimmed APP (APPLOVIN CORP) in Q4 2025 · 3.9% of portfolio.
